Okay, so the first type of sale would be EFT to remote only if you're swapping your gym and getting rid of group training and any training at your facility altogether. So more or less this is the way that the story cadence will go. You've already clarified the problems, you've already labeled them with pain, etc. It's like, listen, Lisa had been doing this for a while, I started 101, I decided to try and do group to save on time, help more people. When I look back at my results, it kind of makes me sick because I used to have this big wall of testimonials and like, this person's gone, this person's gone, this person's gone, and people leave all the time because they don't have one-on-one attention, right? And so what you may not know is that my 101 clients online are actually getting insane results and they don't even make all the sacros of my engine clients are. So they're getting better results, they have to do less because I'm able to cater things specifically to them rather than having templated workouts and templated solutions that are kind of one size fits all, alright? And they're able to focus on what matters, which is the food and lifestyle, which is the things that are going to drive the result, right? And so I feel like we've gone away from our roots and that's honestly why I started this was to help people and I feel like I'm no longer being able to say that I'm helping them in the best way I possibly can, right? And so in an effort to help everyone get the best results, I'm switching back from group training to 101. But instead of working out here at set times, driving here and back, showering, etc., you're going to walk out at your own convenience, right? With workouts made specifically for you, alright? And I'm going to be checking in on you daily to make sure that you eat what you're supposed to in a way that's sustainable to make it impossible to fall off, alright? So the things that you struggled with before, getting in, being out of accountable, sticking with the food, that is what I'm going to be able to prevent in all of the 101 situation and that is what's going to unlock you actually hitting your goals like all the clients that have had in the past, right? And so listen, give me a shot, give me six weeks and I promise that you're going to love this more than anything else. So you can have two options here if you're selling this. You can either sign them straight into the recurring, that's fine. If you want to have a slightly sexier offer, you can say listen, if you don't get better results in the next six weeks than you did in the last six weeks, I'll give your money back, alright? That's a very strong offer and most of them haven't had results in the last six weeks of their EFTs and so they probably will get great results and so you'll be able to say exactly what you said, right? The second way is like, hey listen, if you don't at least, like you haven't lost anything in the last six weeks, if you don't lose at least 10 pounds in the next six weeks, I'll continue to work with you until you do, provided you continue to check in, send grocery pictures and take supplements that I tell you to take, alright? So that's a strong offer that you would do in the EFT swap. You can listen to the recordings, each of the guys does their own kind of spin on this but these are the basic points that you're going to cover after you've clarified the pain and given them the problems that, why they have not been successful up to this point.
